chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1711 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application 13.11.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh ************ None present for the Applicant nor any intimation received; although the name of learned Counsel for the Applicant has appeared in daily cause list. Same was position on the last several dates of hearing. This Criminal Bail Application is pending since 26.06.2025 without any progress and after filing of this Criminal Bail Application, the Applicant has not taken any interest in this matter; therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application[s], if any. JUDGE Qurban
